task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Financial Reports' and 'Proposals' folders have been created in the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for folder icons labeled 'Financial Reports' and 'Proposals' within the 'Projects' workspace in the Nuxeo web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Annual Report 2023' was moved into the 'Financial Reports' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the contents of the 'Financial Reports' folder containing the 'Annual Report 2023' document, or a success notification confirming the move.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Q3 Status Report' was moved into the 'Financial Reports' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the contents of the 'Financial Reports' folder containing the 'Q3 Status Report' document, or a success notification confirming the move.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Project Proposal' was moved into the 'Proposals' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the contents of the 'Proposals' folder containing the 'Project Proposal' document, or a success notification confirming the move.

task_completion.description: Verify that the documents were moved and not copied, leaving only the two new folders at the root of the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the 'Projects' workspace root. It should only list the 'Financial Reports' and 'Proposals' folders, with the original three documents no longer present at this level.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Nuxeo Platform GUI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Nuxeo Platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Nuxeo Platform (version 10.10), with its characteristic layout, menus, and document management features.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually moved the files and created folders, rather than just renaming existing items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of folder creation and document moving actions (like selecting items, clicking 'Move', and pasting in the new location) rather than just editing titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in Nuxeo Platform 10.10 at the workspace path '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects'. The expected final state is: 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Q3 Status Report' must be inside the 'Financial Reports' folder. 'Project Proposal' must be inside the 'Proposals' folder. The root 'Projects' workspace must only contain the 'Financial Reports' and 'Proposals' folders.
